report_name: China-Aligned APTs Use Public AI Tools in Espionage Campaigns

threat_actors.name: China-aligned APTs
threat_actors.description: State-sponsored threat actors aligned with China integrating publicly available AI tools like Claude Code and DeepSeek into their cyber-espionage campaigns to automate attacks, generate malicious scripts, and execute commands.
threat_actors.goals: Cyber-espionage against government and financial targets.

attack_patterns.name: Web Protocols
attack_patterns.description: Used standard HTTPS traffic to communicate with the Claude and DeepSeek APIs for command and control, a 'Living off the Trusted Service' tactic.

attack_patterns.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
attack_patterns.description: AI-generated scripts and payloads were downloaded to victim machines for execution via the AI service APIs.

attack_patterns.name: Unix Shell
attack_patterns.description: The Claude Code AI tool was used as an 'execution engine' to generate and execute bash commands on compromised systems.

attack_patterns.name: Web Service
attack_patterns.description: Attackers acquired and used legitimate, commercially available AI platforms (Claude Code, DeepSeek) as offensive tools for command generation and execution.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Used by China-aligned APTs as an 'execution engine' to generate and issue bash commands to be run on compromised systems by feeding it instructions for agentic tool use. This tool is a product of Anthropic.

tools.name: DeepSeek
tools.description: Used by China-aligned APTs for 'offensive reasoning' to devise exploit strategies and generate malicious scripts for tasks like credential harvesting.

identities.name: Government of Thailand
identities.description: Government systems in Thailand were compromised by China-aligned APTs using public AI tools.

identities.name: Government of Afghanistan
identities.description: Government systems in Afghanistan were compromised by China-aligned APTs using public AI tools.

identities.name: Financial Organizations in Taiwan
identities.description: A class of financial organizations in Taiwan targeted and compromised by China-aligned APTs using public AI tools.

infrastructure.name: Claude Code API
infrastructure.description: The legitimate API for Anthropic's Claude Code was used as a C2 channel to generate and execute commands.

infrastructure.name: DeepSeek API
infrastructure.description: The legitimate API for DeepSeek was used as a C2 channel for offensive reasoning and script generation.

indicators.name: APT C2 Communication via Public AI APIs
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: China-Aligned APT C2 Communication via Public AI APIs
id: 9c5b1a3d-8e4f-4b1a-9c8d-6a5b4c3d2e1f
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to public AI service APIs known to be abused by China-aligned APTs for command and control.
references:
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/20th-july-threat-intelligence-report/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-21
tags:
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.command_and_control
level: medium
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|contains:
      - 'api.anthropic.com'
      - 'api.deepseek.com'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects network traffic to legitimate AI service APIs that have been observed being abused by Chinese APT groups for command and control.

indicators.name: Suspicious Curl Command to Anthropic API
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Curl Command to Anthropic API
id: 8d7e6f5a-4b3c-4d2e-8b1a-9c8d7e6f5a4b
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of curl to make a POST request to the Anthropic API, a TTP observed in use by China-aligned APTs for command execution.
references:
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/20th-july-threat-intelligence-report/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-21
tags:
  - attack.t1059.004
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.command_and_control
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '/curl'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - '-X POST'
      - 'https://api.anthropic.com'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects a command-line pattern using curl to interact with the Anthropic API, a technique used by APTs to execute commands generated by AI.
